---
name: Standards update
about: Propose a change or addition to the GI² standards or governance
labels: standards
---

**Which document(s) are affected?**
(e.g. `standards/scoring-formula.md`, `docs/governance-charter.md`)

**Current Text**
Quote the existing text or summarize the current policy.

**Proposed Change**
Describe the modification or new content.

**Rationale**
Why is this update necessary? Reference GI² principles or governance rules.

**Impact**
What other areas of the codebase, apps, or docs might this affect?
